Tracker Dokara:
Four captives have been identified. You must rescue each and every one of them. Afterward, you'll need to defeat their leader, Kasha Orc Warden Halkirk.
Time is of the essence in this mission, so keep in mind that your rank will be determined by how quickly you complete the mission, and you'll receive different rewards accordingly.
Now it's time to travel for the mission. If you're ready, let's get going.
